description: Create a GitFlow branching strategy diagram in draw.io that visually documents the release cycle described in '~/Desktop/release_scenario.txt'. The diagram must include all 7 branches (main, develop, 3 features, 1 release, 1 hotfix) with correct hierarchy/parallelism (time flowing left-to-right), labeled commits, version tags, and proper merge arrows. Use the specific colors requested in the scenario (Blue for main, Green for develop, etc.). Save the source file to '~/Diagrams/gitflow_release.drawio' and export the final diagram as a PNG image to '~/Diagrams/gitflow_release.png'.
